info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/user/name \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/user/name", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request PATCH \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/user/avatar \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: multipart/form-data' \
  --form file=string

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "-----011000010111000001101001\r\nContent-Disposition: form-data; name=\"file\"\r\n\r\nstring\r\n-----011000010111000001101001--\r\n"

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/user/avatar", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

200.description: Returns data about user last visit.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/user/last-visit?resourceType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&parentResourceId=SOME_STRING_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/user/last-visit?resourceType=SOME_STRING_VALUE&parentResourceId=SOME_STRING_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

post.description: Update or create user last visit record

201.description: Successfully updated user last visit record.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/user/last-visit \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"resourceType":"space","resourceId":"string","parentResourceId":"string","childResourceId":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"resourceType\":\"space\",\"resourceId\":\"string\",\"parentResourceId\":\"string\",\"childResourceId\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/user/last-visit", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/organization/%7BorganizationId%7D/users \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '[{"departmentId":"string","id":"string","email":"string","name":"string","phone":"string"}]'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "[{\"departmentId\":\"string\",\"id\":\"string\",\"email\":\"string\",\"name\":\"string\",\"phone\":\"string\"}]"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/organization/%7BorganizationId%7D/users", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
